rulings.Case Title: YAIRE LOPEZ VS. BIMBO BAKERIES USA, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, DECEMBER 13, 2006, LINE 11, DEFENDANT BIMBO BAKERIES USA, INC., JOHN PEREZ, JOE TORRISE, AND LAURA THOMPSON-MCCANN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AS TO INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS. DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AS TO BIMBO. GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO 6TH AND 7TH CAUSES OF ACTION. DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO PUNITIVES AND CAUSES OF ACTION 1, 2, 4, 5 AND 8. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER, TO COMPLY WITH CCP 437c(g). =(302/REQ/PB)
